forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 34. Southwest wind around 10 mph.

forecast.name: Saturday
forecast.detailedForecast: Partly sunny, with a high near 45. West wind 10 to 20 mph, with gusts as high as 39 mph.

weather_report:
As night casts its soft blanket over Boston, the air is crisp and still, glimmering with stars that seem to whisper promises of the day to come. The temperature hovers just above freezing, inviting those who dare to venture outdoors to wrap up in warm layers, perhaps a snug scarf or a reliable jacket, as the southwest wind does its best to weave through the alleys and streets.

As dawn approaches, the promise of a partly sunny Saturday begins to unfurl. With a high expected near a refreshing 45 degrees, the day reveals itself, albeit still challenging the chill of early spring with gusty winds that may playfully tousle unprepared hair. It will be a good day for those who seek solace in the less-traveled paths of the city. A stroll in a local park could be invigorating, while a leisurely cup of coffee at a cafe, where the aroma of freshly brewed beans mingles with the laughter of patrons, could warm both hands and heart. As the sun fights to break through, casting gentle light on buildings that wear their histories like badges, the world comes alive in muted tones. So, dress warmly and embrace the day with a spirit of exploration, for the beauty of Boston awaits amidst the bustling life of its streets.
